indicator.title: CPS labor force flow, unemployed to employed
indicator.notes: BLS CPS research labor-force-flow series; BLS API returned observations for this seasonally adjusted series on 2026-06-01.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
